# Security Checklist: Search by Address in the Map UI

**Purpose**: Validate safe error handling and service availability behavior.
**Created**: 2026-03-11
**Feature**: `specs/024-address-map-search/spec.md`

**Note**: This checklist is generated by the `/prompts:speckit.checklist` workflow.

## Error Handling

- [x] CHK-SEC-001 Invalid or too-short queries return safe, actionable errors.
- [x] CHK-SEC-002 Geocoding outages do not leave the UI in infinite loading states.

## Traceability

- [x] CHK-SEC-003 Geocoding failures are logged for monitoring.
